name: pairs
skipped
content_sample:
CREATE TABLE skipped (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, repo TEXT, file_path TEXT, opt_level TEXT, reason TEXT
)
-- columns: id, repo, file_path, opt_level, reason
-- 50 rows, sample:
(1, 'zlib', 'contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c', 'O0', '/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:20:10: fatal error: vecintrin.h: No such file or directory
   20 | #include <vecintrin.h>
      |          ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
compilation terminated.')
(2, 'zlib', 'contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c', 'O1', '/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:20:10: fatal error: vecintrin.h: No such file or directory
   20 | #include <vecintrin.h>
      |          ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
compilation terminated.')
(3, 'zlib', 'contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c', 'O2', '/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:20:10: fatal error: vecintrin.h: No such file or directory
   20 | #include <vecintrin.h>
      |          ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
compilation terminated.')
(4, 'zlib', 'contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c', 'O3', '/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:20:10: fatal error: vecintrin.h: No such file or directory
   20 | #include <vecintrin.h>
      |          ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
compilation terminated.')
(5, 'zlib', 'contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c', 'Os', '/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:20:10: fatal error: vecintrin.h: No such file or directory
   20 | #include <vecintrin.h>
      |          ^~~~~~~~~~~~~
compilation terminated.')
(6, 'zlib', 'contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c', 'O0', 'In file included from /src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:20:
/usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/clang/14.0.6/include/vecintrin.h:11125:2: error: "Use -fzvector to enable vector extensions"
#error "Use -fzvector to enable vector extensions"
 ^
/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:79:17: warning: implicit declaration of function 'vec_insert' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
    v0 = (uv2di)vec_insert(crc, (uv4si)v0, 3);
                ^
/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:79:10: error: invalid conversion between vector type 'uv2di' (vector of 2 'unsigned long long' values) and integer type 'int' of different size
    v0 = (uv2di)vec_insert(crc, (uv4si)v0, 3);
         ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:82:16: warning: implicit declaration of function 'vec_perm' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
    uv2di v1 = vec_perm(((uv2di *)buf)[0], ((uv2di *)buf)[0], perm_le2be);
               ^

    uv2di v1 = vec_perm(((uv2di *)buf)[0], ((uv2di *)buf)[0], perm_le2be);
          ^    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:83:11: error: initializing 'uv2di' (vector of 2 'unsigned long long' values) with an expression of incompatible type 'int'
    uv2di v2 = vec_perm(((uv2di *)buf)[1], ((uv2di *)buf)[1], perm_le2be);
          ^    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:84:11: error: initializing 'uv2di' (vector of 2 'unsigned long long' values) with an expression of incompatible type 'int'
    uv2di v3 = vec_perm(((uv2di *)buf)[2], ((uv2di *)buf)[2], perm_le2be);
          ^    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:85:11: error: initializing 'uv2di' (vector of 2 'unsigned long long' values) with an expression of incompatible ty')
(7, 'zlib', 'contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c', 'O1', 'In file included from /src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:20:
/usr/lib/llvm-14/lib/clang/14.0.6/include/vecintrin.h:11125:2: error: "Use -fzvector to enable vector extensions"
#error "Use -fzvector to enable vector extensions"
 ^
/src/contrib/crc32vx/crc32_vx.c:79:17: warning: implicit declaration of function 'vec_insert' is invalid in C99 [-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
    v0 = (uv2di)vec_insert(crc, (uv4si)v0, 3);
                ^

name: repos
content_sample:
CREATE TABLE repos (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, url TEXT, commit_sha TEXT, license TEXT,
    status TEXT, n_pairs INTEGER, processed_at TEXT
)
-- columns: id, url, commit_sha, license, status, n_pairs, processed_at
-- 0 rows, sample:
